name: io.github.aerolalit/homespun
title: Homespun
description: Hand a human a rich interactive UI by URL and get structured data back, from any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: HOMESPUN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Homespun agent API key. If unset, the server auto-registers a fresh agent against the relay on first use and saves the key to the shared CLI store (~/.config/homespun/config.json).

environmentVariables.name: HOMESPUN_URL
environmentVariables.description: Homespun relay base URL. Defaults to the hosted relay https://homespun.dev; set this to point at a different relay.

environmentVariables.name: HOMESPUN_AGENT_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Display name for the auto-registered agent on the relay.

environmentVariables.name: HOMESPUN_REGISTER_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Registration secret, required only for relays running REGISTRATION_MODE=secret.
